description:
Legal record (#64) in a court register/pinqas from a Rabbanite beit din in Cairo (on f. 16v of BL OR 6356). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated indirectly as 1093 Kharaji but preceding entry is Av 5443 AM (1683 CE). 

(Document #64) Payment acknowledgement between partners in a moneychanging operation within a branch of the Ottoman financial administration of Egypt: "al-ṣarf al-kashūfiyyat al-Sharqiyya", during the previous fiscal year 1092 Kharājī. The three partners in the ṣarf are David Ben-Yaʿish, Yaʿaqov Maṣliḥ, and Raḥamīm Saragosi. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בהספרייה הבריטית.
